title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
